case_title: TERU MURATA et al VS. PHILLIP DIPAOLO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-11-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ON DEFENDANT LAURA BOWLBY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURATA, TERU NAKAMURA, EIKO SERVED, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE AUG-14-2002 AS TO DEFENDANT BOWLBY, LAURA
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURATA, TERU NAKAMURA, EIKO AS TO DEFENDANT DIPAOLO, PHILLIP BOWLBY, LAURA DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-11-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-09-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-13-2002
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE ,COMPLAINT,
DECLARATION OF KENT S HORI IN RESPONSE TO OSC RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURATA, TERU NAKAMURA, EIKO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-25-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-03-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
